articles.headline: OpenAI 把“会聊天”的模型往“会干活”的代理推了一大步
articles.deck: Responses API 接上 shell 工具和托管容器后，模型开始拥有文件系统、执行环境和受限网络访问；这不只是接口更新，而是代理产品从演示走向生产的一次底层补课。
summary: OpenAI 公开介绍了如何为 Responses API 配置 shell 工具、托管容器工作区、文件读写和受限网络访问，让模型不再只是在提示词里规划步骤，而是能在隔离环境里真正执行命令、生成中间文件，并在多轮任务里保留状态。对于今天的代理系统而言，这类能力比单纯提升模型分数更关键，因为企业真正买单的不是回答，而是能否稳定完成工作流。
这次更新瞄准的是代理落地最现实的摩擦点：大表格不该塞进上下文、文件不能只靠复制粘贴传递、外部 API 访问不能无边界放开、超时重试也不能全靠开发者手搓。OpenAI 等于把一套最常见的代理运行时积木标准化了。它意味着竞争焦点正从“谁的模型更聪明”转向“谁的执行栈更完整、可控、可审计”。
bullets: Responses API 新增围绕 shell 和托管容器的代理执行环境。
模型可以在隔离工作区中读写文件、运行命令并维持状态。
代理平台竞争正从模型能力转向运行时与安全边界。
articles.significance: 2026 年的代理竞争，开始越来越像云平台和开发平台的竞争：谁能把执行、存储、权限和审计打包成可复用的产品，谁就更接近真实业务入口。

zh-TW.headline: OpenAI 把「會聊天」的模型往「會做事」的代理推進了一大步
zh-TW.deck: Responses API 接上 shell 工具與託管容器後，模型開始擁有檔案系統、執行環境與受限網路存取；這不只是介面更新，而是代理產品從展示走向生產的一次底層補課。
summary: OpenAI 公開介紹如何為 Responses API 配置 shell 工具、託管容器工作區、檔案讀寫與受限網路存取，讓模型不再只是在提示詞裡規劃步驟，而是能在隔離環境中真正執行命令、生成中間檔，並在多輪任務裡保留狀態。對當前代理系統而言，這類能力比單純提升模型分數更關鍵，因為企業真正買單的不是回答，而是能否穩定完成工作流。
這次更新瞄準的是代理落地最現實的摩擦點：大表格不該塞進上下文、檔案不能只靠複製貼上傳遞、外部 API 存取不能無邊界放開、逾時重試也不能全靠開發者手搓。OpenAI 等於把一套最常見的代理執行時積木標準化了。這意味著競爭焦點正從『誰的模型更聰明』轉向『誰的執行棧更完整、可控、可審計』。
bullets: Responses API 新增圍繞 shell 與託管容器的代理執行環境。
模型可以在隔離工作區中讀寫檔案、執行命令並維持狀態。
代理平台競爭正從模型能力轉向執行時與安全邊界。
zh-TW.significance: 2026 年的代理競爭，開始越來越像雲平台與開發平台的競爭：誰能把執行、儲存、權限與審計打包成可複用產品，誰就更接近真實業務入口。

sources.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment

en.headline: OpenAI pushes chat models much closer to agents that can actually do work
en.deck: By wiring the Responses API into shell tools and hosted containers, OpenAI is giving models a filesystem, an execution environment, and restricted network access — a foundational shift from demos to production-grade agents.
summary: OpenAI outlined how it is equipping the Responses API with shell tools, hosted workspaces, file handling, and restricted networking. The result is a model that can do more than plan steps in text: it can execute commands in an isolated environment, generate intermediate artifacts, and preserve state across multi-step workflows. For enterprise agent systems, that matters more than another benchmark win, because buyers care about reliable execution, not just clever answers.

The update targets the practical friction points that block agent adoption: large tables should not live inside prompts, files should not move by copy-paste, external API access needs boundaries, and retries or timeouts cannot all be custom glue code. OpenAI is effectively standardizing a common runtime stack for agents. That shifts competition from raw model intelligence toward completeness, control, and auditability of the execution layer.
bullets: The Responses API now centers on a shell-driven agent execution loop with hosted containers.
Models can read and write files, run commands, and keep state inside an isolated workspace.
The agent race is moving from model quality toward runtime design and safety boundaries.
en.significance: The 2026 agent race is starting to look like a cloud-platform race: whoever packages execution, storage, permissions, and observability best will be closer to real business workflows.

articles.headline: Gemini 想进一步接管电子表格这块硬地
articles.deck: Google 称 Gemini in Sheets 在 SpreadsheetBench 上达到 70.48% 成功率，开始逼近“不是帮你解释表格，而是替你操作表格”的产品方向。
summary: Google 宣布 Gemini in Sheets 新增 beta 能力，并强调其在公开基准 SpreadsheetBench 上取得 70.48% 的成功率。和普通问答式办公助手不同，这条路线更强调模型直接创建、整理、编辑整张电子表，处理真实世界里格式混乱、公式复杂、数据关联密集的表格任务。
电子表格一直是 AI 办公最难啃的场景之一，因为它要求模型同时理解结构化数据、业务逻辑和交互操作。Google 现在试图证明，AI 不只是给表格“加聊天框”，而是在往真正的执行层深入。若这一步站稳，办公 AI 的竞争将更接近生产工具链，而不是搜索框之争。
bullets: Google 为 Gemini in Sheets 推出更完整的整表编辑能力。
官方称其在 SpreadsheetBench 上达到 70.48% 成功率。
办公 AI 的竞争焦点正从解释信息转向执行复杂操作。
articles.significance: 谁能稳定处理表格，谁就更接近企业最真实也最琐碎的日常工作场景。

zh-TW.headline: Gemini 想進一步接管電子試算表這塊硬地
zh-TW.deck: Google 表示 Gemini in Sheets 在 SpreadsheetBench 上達到 70.48% 成功率，開始逼近「不是幫你解釋表格，而是替你操作表格」的產品方向。
summary: Google 宣布 Gemini in Sheets 新增 beta 能力，並強調其在公開基準 SpreadsheetBench 上取得 70.48% 的成功率。和一般問答式辦公助手不同，這條路線更強調模型直接建立、整理、編輯整張試算表，處理真實世界裡格式混亂、公式複雜、資料關聯密集的任務。
電子試算表一直是 AI 辦公最難啃的場景之一，因為它要求模型同時理解結構化資料、業務邏輯與互動操作。Google 現在試圖證明，AI 不只是替表格加上一個聊天框，而是在往真正的執行層深入。若這一步站穩，辦公 AI 的競爭將更接近生產工具鏈，而不是搜尋框之爭。

en.headline: Gemini is pushing deeper into the hardest part of office AI: spreadsheets
en.deck: Google says Gemini in Sheets reached a 70.48% success rate on SpreadsheetBench, aiming not just to explain spreadsheets but to operate them.
summary: Google says Gemini in Sheets now has broader beta capabilities and achieved a 70.48% success rate on the public SpreadsheetBench benchmark. Unlike office assistants built around question answering, this approach is about creating, organizing, and editing entire sheets in messy real-world settings where formulas, formats, and linked data all matter.

Spreadsheets remain one of the hardest environments for office AI because they require structured reasoning, business logic, and interface-level actions at the same time. Google is trying to show that AI is moving past putting a chat layer on top of documents and into the execution layer itself. If that holds, office AI competition will look much more like workflow software competition.
bullets: Google is extending Gemini in Sheets toward full-sheet editing workflows.
The company says the product hit 70.48% success on SpreadsheetBench.
Office AI is shifting from explaining information to operating complex workflows.
en.significance: Whoever handles spreadsheets reliably gets closer to the most persistent and high-value work inside enterprises.

articles.headline: Claude 开始把图表和示意图直接塞进对话里
articles.deck: Anthropic 让 Claude 在聊天过程中按需生成图表、图解和可交互视觉元素，意味着“文本回答”正在被更丰富的解释界面替代。
summary: Anthropic 宣布 Claude 可在对话中直接生成图表、图解等视觉化内容，并按上下文自动判断是否需要插入这些元素。和过去把生成结果放在侧栏的 artifacts 不同，这次更像是把“解释方式”本身改掉：模型不再只吐文字，而是开始把视觉表达当成默认输出之一。
这条更新与 OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 里加入数学和科学交互可视化、Google 推教育图像的方向互相呼应。助手产品正在进入一个新的界面竞争阶段：不只比谁答得快、答得准，也比谁能更自然地把抽象概念转成可理解、可交互、可修改的表现形式。
bullets: Claude 现在可在对话中直接生成图表和图解。
新功能面向所有用户默认开启。
聊天助手开始从纯文本界面转向多模态解释界面。
articles.significance: 当视觉化回答成为默认能力后，通用助手的竞争不再只是语言质量，还会落到界面设计和认知负担管理上。

sources.title: Anthropic’s Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now

en.headline: Claude is starting to drop charts and diagrams directly into the chat
en.deck: Anthropic is turning visual elements into an inline part of Claude’s answers, signaling that rich explanation surfaces are replacing text-only chat.
summary: Anthropic says Claude can now generate charts, diagrams, and other visual outputs directly inside a conversation, and decide contextually when to do so. That is different from the older artifacts model in which generated content lived in a side panel. This time, the explanation layer itself is changing: the model is not just emitting text, it is treating visual expression as a native output mode.

The move lines up with similar pushes from OpenAI and Google around educational visualizations and interactive images. Assistant products are entering a new interface competition: not only who answers faster or more accurately, but who can translate abstract concepts into understandable, interactive, and editable forms.
bullets: Claude can now generate charts and diagrams inline during chat.
The feature is rolling out to all users and enabled by default.
Assistant UX is moving from text-only chat toward multimodal explanation surfaces.
en.significance: Once visual answers become a default expectation, the assistant race will hinge as much on interface design as on language quality.

articles.headline: Meta 把 AI 自动回复塞进二手交易聊天框
articles.deck: Facebook Marketplace 新增 Meta AI 自动回复、价格建议和资料摘要，说明生成式 AI 正在被拆成一堆很小、但足够高频的交易摩擦修复器。
summary: Meta 为 Facebook Marketplace 推出多项 AI 功能，包括自动回复“还在吗”之类的询问、根据照片补全商品详情、参考附近同类商品建议价格，以及为卖家资料生成摘要。这不是轰动级模型发布，但它很像平台公司最擅长的那种产品推进：把 AI 拆进最容易提高转化率和响应效率的细碎环节。
对生成式 AI 来说，这类场景的价值并不在惊艳，而在于是否能持续减少交易流程里的摩擦。若自动回复、智能定价和卖家信誉摘要都被证明有效，AI 在消费平台中的位置会越来越像一层常驻运营基础设施，而不是单独摆在入口处的聊天机器人。
bullets: Meta 为 Marketplace 加入 AI 自动回复、价格建议和资料摘要。
AI 被拆进二手交易流程中的多个高频微环节。
消费平台正在把生成式 AI 当作运营基础设施使用。
articles.significance: 真正改变日常互联网体验的，往往不是最大模型，而是那些被悄悄嵌入平台默认流程的“小 AI 功能”。

zh-TW.headline: Meta 把 AI 自動回覆塞進二手交易聊天框
zh-TW.deck: Facebook Marketplace 新增 Meta AI 自動回覆、價格建議與資料摘要，說明生成式 AI 正被拆成一堆很小、但足夠高頻的交易摩擦修復器。
summary: Meta 為 Facebook Marketplace 推出多項 AI 功能，包括自動回覆『還在嗎』之類詢問、根據照片補全商品詳情、參考附近同類商品建議價格，以及為賣家資料生成摘要。這不是轟動級模型發布，但很像平台公司最擅長的產品推進：把 AI 拆進最容易提升轉化率與回覆效率的細碎環節。
對生成式 AI 來說，這類場景的價值不在驚艷，而在於是否能持續減少交易流程裡的摩擦。若自動回覆、智慧定價與賣家信譽摘要都被證明有效，AI 在消費平台中的位置會越來越像一層常駐營運基礎設施，而不是單獨擺在入口處的聊天機器人。

en.headline: Meta is pushing AI auto-replies into secondhand commerce chats
en.deck: Facebook Marketplace is adding AI replies, pricing suggestions, and profile summaries — a sign that generative AI is being broken into many small but high-frequency friction reducers.
summary: Meta is rolling out several AI features to Facebook Marketplace, including automatic replies to availability questions, item-detail suggestions from photos, nearby price recommendations, and generated summaries of seller profiles. This is not a headline-grabbing model launch, but it fits the kind of product move platform companies are best at: inserting AI into narrow moments that can improve conversion and response time.

For generative AI, the value here is not spectacle but measurable reduction of transaction friction. If auto-replies, AI pricing, and trust-layer summaries work, AI on consumer platforms will increasingly look like embedded operational infrastructure rather than a standalone chatbot waiting at the front door.
bullets: Meta is adding AI replies, pricing suggestions, and profile summaries to Marketplace.
Generative AI is being decomposed into many small transaction-level features.
Consumer platforms are treating AI as operational infrastructure, not just chat.
en.significance: The AI features that change daily internet behavior may be the quiet defaults inside platforms, not the biggest frontier models.

articles.headline: 美军把生成式 AI 拉进目标排序想象图，治理难题随之提前到来
articles.deck: MIT Technology Review 披露，美方防务官员设想用生成式 AI 对目标列表做优先级建议，再由人工审核；这让“人类在环”不再是抽象原则，而是必须被追问的制度细节。
summary: MIT Technology Review 援引一名美国防务官员说法称，生成式 AI 未来可能被用于分析目标候选列表、考虑飞机位置等因素，并对“先打哪一个”给出建议，最终结果再由人类复核。官员没有确认这是否已在现役流程中使用，但这番表述已经足以说明，生成式 AI 正被认真纳入高风险决策想定。
问题不在于系统会不会直接按按钮，而在于一旦模型进入排序和建议环节，它就开始影响注意力分配、节奏判断和责任链条。所谓 human-in-the-loop 若只是最后点头的人机接口，而没有完整审计、证据保存和可追责设计，治理承诺就很容易沦为空话。
bullets: 美防务官员设想用生成式 AI 排序目标优先级。
官方仍强调由人工审核和评估建议结果。
高风险 AI 的治理焦点正在转向责任链和审计证据。
articles.significance: 生成式 AI 一旦进入军事决策前链条，真正重要的不是模型会不会“开火”，而是谁定义建议、谁保存证据、谁承担后果。

en.headline: As the Pentagon imagines generative AI ranking targets, governance questions arrive early
en.deck: MIT Technology Review reports that US defense officials are contemplating generative AI systems that recommend target priorities for human review — turning “human in the loop” from a slogan into a concrete governance test.
summary: MIT Technology Review reports that a US defense official described a future scenario in which generative AI systems analyze target lists, account for operational factors such as aircraft location, and recommend which targets should be prioritized first, with humans reviewing the output. The official did not confirm whether such systems are already active in current operations, but the description makes clear that generative AI is being seriously considered for high-risk decision contexts.

The issue is not only whether a system directly makes a strike decision. Once a model enters the recommendation and ranking layer, it begins shaping attention, tempo, and responsibility chains. If human-in-the-loop means only a final approval screen without full audit trails, evidence retention, and accountability design, governance promises become very thin.
bullets: A US defense official described generative AI as a possible target-prioritization aid.
Humans would still be expected to review and evaluate the recommendations.
The real governance fight is shifting toward accountability, evidence, and auditability.
en.significance: Once generative AI enters the pre-decision chain of military operations, the central question is not whether the model “pulls the trigger,” but who defines the recommendation, preserves the evidence, and owns the consequence.

articles.headline: Anthropic 与五角大楼冲突，争的已不只是生意而是代码边界
articles.deck: EFF 支持 Anthropic 就“供应链风险” designation 提起诉讼，核心问题是：政府能否逼一家模型公司改写护栏，去适配更强的 AI 监控需求。
summary: EFF 发文支持 Anthropic 与美国国防部之间的法律争议，认为政府若因公司拒绝将模型用于监控用途、进而施压其修改代码和移除护栏，可能构成对言论与表达选择的强制。EFF 的论证并不只是站队某家公司，而是在更早阶段把一个关键问题摊开：模型公司的安全边界，到底有多大程度属于可被强制改写的“商业参数”。
这场冲突之所以重要，是因为前沿模型正越来越深地进入国家安全、基础设施和公共决策场景。一旦政府采购、风险认定与监管工具同时被用来要求更少限制、更高监控能力，模型厂商的“安全承诺”就会承受极强的现实挤压。AI 治理因此不只是规则文本，也将变成围绕代码与默认设置的权力争夺。
bullets: EFF 支持 Anthropic 挑战五角大楼相关 designation。
争议焦点是政府能否迫使模型公司移除护栏。
AI 治理的战场正在从原则讨论进入代码与默认设置。
articles.significance: 未来几年，模型公司的真正红线未必写在发布会上，而会写在合同、法院文件和是否愿意改动默认护栏里。

zh-TW.deck: EFF 支持 Anthropic 就「供應鏈風險」designation 提起訴訟，核心問題是：政府能否逼一家模型公司改寫護欄，去適配更強的 AI 監控需求。
summary: EFF 發文支持 Anthropic 與美國國防部之間的法律爭議，認為政府若因公司拒絕將模型用於監控用途、進而施壓其修改程式碼與移除護欄，可能構成對言論與表達選擇的強制。EFF 的論證不只是站隊某家公司，而是在更早階段把一個關鍵問題攤開：模型公司的安全邊界，到底有多大程度屬於可被強制改寫的『商業參數』。
這場衝突之所以重要，是因為前沿模型正越來越深地進入國家安全、基礎設施與公共決策場景。一旦政府採購、風險認定與監管工具同時被用來要求更少限制、更高監控能力，模型廠商的『安全承諾』就會承受極強的現實擠壓。AI 治理因此不只是規則文本，也將變成圍繞程式碼與預設設定的權力爭奪。

en.headline: The Anthropic-Pentagon clash is no longer just business — it is about the boundaries of code
en.deck: EFF is backing Anthropic’s legal fight over a “supply chain risk” designation, raising a deeper question: can government pressure an AI company to rewrite its guardrails for stronger surveillance use cases?
summary: EFF argues that if the US government retaliates against a company for refusing surveillance uses and pressures it to modify code or remove guardrails, that can amount to compelled expression. The point is larger than support for one company. It surfaces a foundational question early: to what extent are an AI company’s safety boundaries part of its protected product design choices rather than negotiable commercial parameters?

The dispute matters because frontier models are moving deeper into national security, infrastructure, and public-sector decision environments. If procurement pressure, risk designations, and regulatory leverage all push toward fewer restrictions and more monitoring power, then model companies’ public safety commitments will face intense real-world stress. AI governance will not just be written in policy papers; it will be fought through code and defaults.
bullets: EFF supports Anthropic’s legal challenge tied to Pentagon pressure.
The key question is whether government can force a model company to weaken safeguards.
AI governance is moving from abstract principles into code-level defaults.
en.significance: In the years ahead, the real red lines for AI companies may be written less in product launches than in contracts, court filings, and whether they are willing to change default guardrails.

articles.headline: 微软把 AI 代理调试这件脏活，开始做成框架和基准
articles.deck: AgentRx 试图定位代理轨迹里的“第一处不可恢复失败”，并配套发布 115 条失败轨迹数据集；这类工具意味着代理工程开始进入真正讲 observability 的阶段。
summary: Microsoft Research 发布 AgentRx，目标不是评估代理有没有完成任务，而是追踪一条长轨迹中“最早出现且无法挽回”的关键失败步骤。它会根据工具 schema 和领域策略自动合成约束，逐步检查轨迹并记录证据，再交给 LLM judge 判断 critical failure step 与根因类别。微软同时还发布了包含 115 条人工标注失败轨迹的数据集和九类失败 taxonomy。
这件事之所以重要，是因为代理系统一旦变成长流程、多工具、多角色协作，仅凭“成功率”已经很难指导迭代。真正的工程瓶颈变成了：到底是哪一步错了、为什么错、下次怎么防。AgentRx 这类工作把代理从 demo 工程推进到可诊断、可复盘、可持续改进的软件工程对象。
bullets: AgentRx 用约束合成和逐步验证定位代理关键失败步骤。
微软同时发布 115 条失败轨迹基准数据集。
代理工程开始补上 observability 和 root-cause analysis 这块基础设施。
articles.significance: 没有调试与复盘能力，代理系统就很难真正进入生产；AgentRx 代表行业开始认真补齐这块缺口。

en.headline: Microsoft is turning the dirty work of agent debugging into a framework and benchmark
en.deck: AgentRx tries to identify the first unrecoverable failure inside an agent trajectory, backed by a 115-trajectory benchmark — a sign that agent engineering is entering a real observability phase.
summary: Microsoft Research introduced AgentRx, a framework designed not just to score whether an agent finished a task, but to localize the earliest unrecoverable failure in a long trajectory. It synthesizes constraints from tool schemas and domain policies, validates each step with evidence, and then uses an LLM judge to identify the critical failure step and root-cause category. Microsoft also released a benchmark of 115 manually annotated failed trajectories and a nine-part failure taxonomy.

That matters because once agent systems become long-running, tool-using, and multi-actor, success rate alone is no longer enough to guide iteration. The engineering bottleneck becomes much more basic: which step broke, why it broke, and how to prevent recurrence. Work like AgentRx moves agents from demo software toward diagnosable, inspectable, continuously improvable systems.
bullets: AgentRx synthesizes constraints and stepwise validation to find critical failure steps.
Microsoft released a benchmark with 115 annotated failed trajectories.
Agent engineering is finally getting observability and root-cause tooling.
en.significance: Without debugging and postmortem tooling, agents struggle to reach production. AgentRx signals that the industry is starting to close that gap.

articles.headline: LangChain 想让代理自己决定什么时候“压缩记忆”
articles.deck: Deep Agents SDK 和 CLI 新增 autonomous context compression 工具，把原本依赖固定阈值或人工 /compact 的动作交给模型自行触发。
summary: LangChain 在 Deep Agents SDK 与 CLI 中加入了让模型自主触发 context compression 的工具。过去这类压缩通常由框架在上下文接近上限时自动进行，或者由用户手动输入 /compact；现在 LangChain 想把这个时机判断交还给代理本身，让它在任务边界、读入大量新上下文之前、或准备进入复杂流程前主动收缩工作记忆。
这看似只是一个小工具，实际上正碰到代理设计里的核心问题：模型除了会推理和调用工具，还能否管理自己的认知预算。随着超长任务变多，代理能力的上限越来越取决于“什么时候忘、怎么忘、忘到什么程度”，而不只是上下文窗口本身有多长。
bullets: LangChain 让模型自己触发上下文压缩，而非只靠固定阈值。
新工具已进入 Deep Agents CLI，并可在 SDK 中启用。
代理的“记忆管理”正成为与推理同等重要的设计层。
articles.significance: 下一阶段的代理优化，不只是拼更长上下文，而是拼谁更会管理有限上下文。

zh-TW.headline: LangChain 想讓代理自己決定什麼時候「壓縮記憶」
zh-TW.deck: Deep Agents SDK 與 CLI 新增 autonomous context compression 工具，把原本依賴固定閾值或人工 /compact 的動作交給模型自行觸發。
summary: LangChain 在 Deep Agents SDK 與 CLI 中加入讓模型自主觸發 context compression 的工具。過去這類壓縮通常由框架在上下文接近上限時自動進行，或由使用者手動輸入 /compact；現在 LangChain 想把這個時機判斷交還給代理本身，讓它在任務邊界、讀入大量新上下文之前，或準備進入複雜流程前主動收縮工作記憶。
這看似只是個小工具，實際上正碰到代理設計裡的核心問題：模型除了會推理和呼叫工具，還能否管理自己的認知預算。隨著超長任務變多，代理能力的上限越來越取決於『什麼時候忘、怎麼忘、忘到什麼程度』，而不只是上下文視窗本身有多長。
bullets: LangChain 讓模型自己觸發上下文壓縮，而非只靠固定閾值。
新工具已進入 Deep Agents CLI，並可在 SDK 中啟用。
代理的『記憶管理』正成為與推理同等重要的設計層。
zh-TW.significance: 下一階段的代理優化，不只是拼更長上下文，而是拼誰更會管理有限上下文。

sources.title: Autonomous context compression

en.headline: LangChain wants agents to decide for themselves when to compress memory
en.deck: A new autonomous context compression tool in Deep Agents SDK and CLI lets the model trigger compaction itself instead of relying only on thresholds or manual commands.
summary: LangChain added a tool to Deep Agents SDK and CLI that allows models to trigger context compression autonomously. Previously, compaction was typically driven by framework thresholds or by explicit user commands such as /compact. LangChain now wants agents to make that timing decision themselves, for example at task boundaries, before ingesting large amounts of new context, or before entering a complex multi-step workflow.

It looks like a small tool, but it touches a central design question for agents: beyond reasoning and tool use, can a model manage its own cognitive budget? As long-running tasks become more common, the ceiling on agent performance will increasingly depend on when to forget, how to forget, and what level of abstraction to keep — not just on how large the raw context window is.
bullets: LangChain is letting models trigger context compression themselves instead of only following fixed thresholds.
The feature is live in Deep Agents CLI and available for SDK users to enable.
Memory management is becoming a first-class design layer for agents.
en.significance: The next wave of agent optimization is not just about longer context windows, but about who can manage finite context most intelligently.

articles.headline: NVIDIA 在 Hugging Face 讲了一套更像“数据科学家”的代理架构
articles.deck: 基于 NeMo Agent Toolkit 的 Data Explorer 在 DABStep 上冲到第一，并声称相对 Claude Code baseline 有 30 倍速度提升，显示专用代理正在往垂直工作流里卷。
summary: NVIDIA KGMON 团队在 Hugging Face 博客介绍了基于 NeMo Agent Toolkit 的 Data Explorer 架构，目标是让代理像数据科学家一样处理结构化数据探索、表格问答、可视化和预测建模。团队称该方案在 DABStep 基准上排名第一，并实现相对 Claude Code baseline 的 30 倍速度提升。核心做法是把开放式探索与规则化表格问答拆成不同循环，并为其配备状态化 Python 解释器、检索器、文件结构探测器等工具。
这条信息的重要性在于，代理开始更明确地从“通用助手”分化为“垂直工种”。面向数据分析的代理，不一定要在所有任务上都万能，而是要在特定工作流中拥有更合适的工具、记忆和推理节奏。未来很多代理产品竞争，很可能不是大而全，而是更像一个个职业软件包。
bullets: NeMo Agent Toolkit Data Explorer 主打结构化数据探索与分析。
团队称其在 DABStep 上排名第一，并快于 Claude Code baseline。
专用代理正朝“垂直工种软件”方向演化。
articles.significance: 代理赛道开始细分职业场景：谁最懂某个工作流，谁就可能先形成稳定壁垒。

zh-TW.deck: 基於 NeMo Agent Toolkit 的 Data Explorer 在 DABStep 上衝到第一，並聲稱相對 Claude Code baseline 有 30 倍速度提升，顯示專用代理正往垂直工作流裡捲。
summary: NVIDIA KGMON 團隊在 Hugging Face 部落格介紹了基於 NeMo Agent Toolkit 的 Data Explorer 架構，目標是讓代理像資料科學家一樣處理結構化資料探索、表格問答、視覺化與預測建模。團隊稱該方案在 DABStep 基準上排名第一，並實現相對 Claude Code baseline 的 30 倍速度提升。核心做法是把開放式探索與規則化表格問答拆成不同迴圈，並為其配備有狀態 Python 解譯器、檢索器、檔案結構探測器等工具。
這條資訊的重要性在於，代理開始更明確地從『通用助手』分化為『垂直工種』。面向資料分析的代理，不一定要在所有任務上都萬能，而是要在特定工作流中擁有更合適的工具、記憶與推理節奏。未來很多代理產品競爭，很可能不是大而全，而是更像一套套職業軟體包。

sources.title: Build an Agent That Thinks Like a Data Scientist: How We Hit #1 on DABStep with Reusable Tool Generation

en.headline: NVIDIA is pitching an agent architecture that behaves much more like a data scientist
en.deck: A NeMo Agent Toolkit-based Data Explorer topped DABStep and claimed a 30x speedup over a Claude Code baseline, showing how specialized agents are pushing into vertical workflows.
summary: NVIDIA’s KGMON team used the Hugging Face blog to detail a Data Explorer architecture built on NeMo Agent Toolkit. The goal is to make an agent behave more like a data scientist across structured-data exploration, tabular question answering, visualization, and predictive modeling. The team says it ranked first on the DABStep benchmark and achieved a 30x speedup over a Claude Code baseline. The architecture splits open-ended exploration from rule-based tabular QA and equips those loops with tools such as a stateful Python interpreter, retriever, and file-structure detector.

The bigger signal is that agents are becoming less like generic assistants and more like vertical workers. A data-analysis agent does not need to be universally capable if it has the right tools, memory structure, and reasoning cadence for one workflow. Many future agent products may compete less as general AI and more as occupation-specific software packages.
bullets: The NeMo-based Data Explorer focuses on structured-data exploration and analysis.
The team says it topped DABStep and ran far faster than a Claude Code baseline.
Specialized agents are evolving toward vertical workflow software.
en.significance: The agent market is starting to split by profession and workflow: whoever understands a specific job best may build the strongest moat first.

articles.headline: Google 把 Gemini 用在洪水新闻提数，想补上城市暴洪预警的“数据地基”
articles.deck: Google Research 推出 Groundsource，并在 Flood Hub 上铺开城市暴洪 24 小时预测；关键突破不只是模型本身，而是先把分散新闻转成可训练的事件数据。
summary: Google Research 宣布在 Flood Hub 上推出面向城市暴洪的预测能力，最长可提前 24 小时提示风险。难点不只是建模，而是城市暴洪长期缺少足够细致的历史“地面真值”数据。为此，Google 先提出 Groundsource 方法，用 Gemini 从公开新闻报道中提取洪水发生的时间、地点等结构化信息，进而拼出训练数据集。
这是一条很有代表性的公共 AI 落地路径：与其先夸模型多聪明，不如先补全原本不存在的数据基础设施。对很多公共问题而言，AI 能否见效，往往不取决于前沿模型参数，而取决于能否把散落在文本、表单和地方记录里的现实碎片，整理成可用的数据底板。
bullets: Google 在 Flood Hub 上推出城市暴洪风险预测。
Groundsource 用 Gemini 把新闻报道转成结构化洪水事件数据。
公共 AI 的关键常常不在模型，而在数据基础设施。
articles.significance: 如果 Groundsource 这类方法被验证有效，生成式 AI 在公共领域最重要的角色之一，可能是“把零散现实转成机器可用事实”。

sources.title: Protecting cities with AI-driven flash flood forecasting
Introducing Groundsource: Turning news reports into data with Gemini

en.headline: Google is using Gemini to turn flood news into data — and build the missing foundation for urban flash-flood warnings
en.deck: Google Research launched Groundsource and expanded 24-hour urban flash-flood forecasts on Flood Hub, showing that the real breakthrough may be the event dataset more than the model itself.
summary: Google Research says it is rolling out urban flash-flood risk forecasts on Flood Hub, with warnings up to 24 hours in advance. The harder problem was not only modeling but the lack of high-quality historical ground-truth data for city flash floods. To address that, Google introduced Groundsource, a method that uses Gemini to extract structured event information such as time and location from public news reports and assemble a usable training dataset.

This is a revealing pattern for public-interest AI deployment: instead of leading with model sophistication, the work starts by building data infrastructure that did not previously exist. In many civic problems, AI effectiveness depends less on frontier model size and more on whether scattered fragments of reality in text, forms, and local reporting can be turned into usable machine-readable facts.
bullets: Google expanded Flood Hub with urban flash-flood forecasts.
Groundsource uses Gemini to convert flood news reports into structured event data.
In public AI, the limiting factor is often data infrastructure, not model architecture.
en.significance: If methods like Groundsource hold up, one of the most important roles for generative AI in the public sector may be converting fragmented reality into machine-usable facts.

articles.headline: Google 想用地理与健康数据，把偏远地区心脏病预防做得更早一些
articles.deck: Google Australia 投入 100 万澳元，在澳洲偏远社区联合医疗机构测试 Population Health AI；重点不是替代医生，而是更早识别哪些地区正在积累健康风险。
summary: Google 宣布与澳大利亚多家医疗和研究机构合作，在偏远社区推进一项心脏健康项目，并由 Google Australia 的 Digital Future Initiative 投入 100 万澳元支持。项目使用 Google for Health 的 Population Health AI，结合地理、空气质量、花粉、临床记录等去标识化与聚合数据，帮助合作方更早识别社区层面的慢病风险。
这类项目最值得注意的地方，在于它把 AI 的位置放在“预防与资源分配”而非“替医生诊断”。对偏远地区而言，真正稀缺的不一定是某个模型回答得更像专家，而是能否更早知道哪里需要筛查、哪里需要资源、哪里正在被系统性忽视。AI 在公共健康里的价值，可能首先体现在分配逻辑，而不是问诊界面。
bullets: Google 在澳洲偏远社区启动心脏健康 AI 项目。
Population Health AI 结合健康与地理等聚合数据识别风险。
公共健康 AI 更早显现的价值可能是资源配置，而非诊断替代。
articles.significance: 医疗 AI 的真实落地，不一定先发生在医院对话框里，也可能先发生在公共健康地图和预算分配表上。

summary: Google 宣布與澳洲多家醫療與研究機構合作，在偏遠社區推進一項心臟健康計畫，並由 Google Australia 的 Digital Future Initiative 投入 100 萬澳元支持。項目使用 Google for Health 的 Population Health AI，結合地理、空氣品質、花粉、臨床紀錄等去識別化與聚合資料，幫助合作方更早識別社區層面的慢病風險。
這類項目最值得注意之處，在於它把 AI 的位置放在『預防與資源分配』而非『替醫生診斷』。對偏遠地區而言，真正稀缺的不一定是某個模型回答得更像專家，而是能否更早知道哪裡需要篩檢、哪裡需要資源、哪裡正在被系統性忽視。AI 在公共健康裡的價值，可能首先體現在分配邏輯，而不是問診介面。

sources.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia

en.headline: Google wants to use geography and health data to intervene earlier on heart disease in remote communities
en.deck: With a A$1 million investment in rural Australia, Google is testing Population Health AI to identify where health risk is building before care systems can respond.
summary: Google says it is partnering with healthcare and research organizations in rural Australia on a new heart-health initiative backed by A$1 million from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative. The project uses Google for Health’s Population Health AI and combines de-identified, aggregated data such as geography, air quality, pollen, and clinical records to identify chronic-disease risks earlier at the community level.

What stands out is where the AI is positioned: not as a replacement for doctors, but as an early-warning and resource-allocation layer. In remote communities, scarcity often lies less in expert advice than in knowing sooner which areas need screening, support, and policy attention. In public health, AI’s first durable value may show up in distribution logic rather than in conversational diagnosis.
bullets: Google launched a heart-health AI initiative focused on rural Australian communities.
Population Health AI combines health and geospatial data to surface community-level risk.
In public health, AI may prove its value earlier through resource allocation than diagnosis.
en.significance: The first meaningful deployment of medical AI may happen less in chatbot interfaces and more in public-health maps and planning decisions.

articles.headline: Microsoft 也做了“健康 Copilot”，医疗 AI 开始卷数据接口而不只卷回答
articles.deck: Copilot Health 可接入病历、化验结果和 50 多种可穿戴设备，强调独立隐私控制与不用于训练；医疗助手竞争正在从会不会答，转向谁能接更多真实数据。
summary: 微软宣布推出 Copilot Health，提供一个与普通 Copilot 隔离的健康聊天空间。用户可通过 HealthEx 接入 5 万多家美国医院和医疗机构的病历，通过 Function 导入化验结果，还能连接 50 多种可穿戴设备。微软强调，聊天数据具备额外访问、隐私与安全控制，且不会用于训练 AI 模型。
这说明医疗 AI 的竞争正在发生变化：单靠“能回答健康问题”已经不够，真正壁垒开始来自数据连接能力、隐私承诺、来源可信度和责任边界设计。对用户来说，医疗助手是否有价值，不只是看回答像不像医生，而是看它能否读懂你真实的健康记录，又不把这些记录变成新的风险。
bullets: Copilot Health 支持接入病历、化验结果和多种可穿戴设备。
微软强调该空间与普通 Copilot 隔离，且数据不用于训练。
医疗 AI 产品竞争正从回答能力转向数据接口和责任设计。
articles.significance: 医疗助手下一步的门槛，很可能不是模型本身，而是谁能在可信边界内接住最多真实世界数据。

zh-TW.deck: Copilot Health 可接入病歷、化驗結果與 50 多種穿戴設備，強調獨立隱私控制與不作為訓練用途；醫療助手競爭正從會不會答，轉向誰能接更多真實資料。
summary: 微軟宣布推出 Copilot Health，提供一個與一般 Copilot 隔離的健康聊天空間。使用者可透過 HealthEx 接入 5 萬多家美國醫院與醫療機構的病歷，透過 Function 匯入化驗結果，還能連接 50 多種穿戴設備。微軟強調，聊天資料具備額外存取、隱私與安全控制，且不會用於訓練 AI 模型。
這說明醫療 AI 的競爭正在改變：單靠『能回答健康問題』已經不夠，真正壁壘開始來自資料連接能力、隱私承諾、來源可信度與責任邊界設計。對使用者而言，醫療助手是否有價值，不只是看回答像不像醫生，而是看它能否讀懂你真實的健康紀錄，又不把這些紀錄變成新的風險。

sources.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Health can connect to your medical records and wearables

en.headline: Microsoft has its own health copilot now — and medical AI is starting to compete on data access, not just answers
en.deck: Copilot Health connects to medical records, lab results, and more than 50 wearables while promising extra privacy controls and no training use of health chats.
summary: Microsoft launched Copilot Health as a dedicated, separate health space inside Copilot. Users can connect medical records from more than 50,000 US hospitals and healthcare organizations through HealthEx, import lab results through Function, and integrate more than 50 wearable devices. Microsoft says the experience comes with added privacy and safety controls and that data from health chats is not used to train its AI models.

That signals a change in the medical AI race. Simply answering health questions is no longer enough. The real moat is shifting toward secure data connectivity, trust in sources, privacy promises, and clearly defined responsibility boundaries. For users, the value of a health assistant depends less on whether it sounds doctor-like and more on whether it can understand real records without turning them into a new risk surface.
bullets: Copilot Health supports medical records, lab results, and dozens of wearables.
Microsoft says the experience is isolated from general Copilot and not used for model training.
Medical AI competition is moving toward data interfaces, trust, and responsibility design.
en.significance: The next barrier in medical AI may not be the model itself, but who can responsibly connect to the most real-world data inside a trusted boundary.
